title: BEM-935 Block D schemas
objective:
Run script:
"""
def write_file(path, text):
    p=Path(path)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))

# Safe migration of known legacy prompt refs to canonical role templates.
el=Path('governance/state/elements_registry.json')
if el.exists():
    text=el.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
    original=text
    replacements={
      'governance/prompts/curator_prompt.md':'governance/prompts/templates/curator_template.md',
      'governance/prompts/analyst_prompt.md':'governance/prompts/templates/analyst_template.md',
      'governance/prompts/auditor_prompt.md':'governance/prompts/templates/auditor_template.md',
      'governance/prompts/executor_prompt.md':'governance/prompts/templates/executor_template.md'
    }
    for old,new in replacements.items():
        text=text.replace(old,new)
    if text!=original:
        el.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(el))
    migration_status='updated_known_role_prompt_refs' if text!=original else 'no_known_role_prompt_refs_changed'
else:
    migration_status='elements_registry_missing'

write_file('governance/reports/BEM935_ELEMENTS_PROMPT_MIGRATION.md', f'''# BEM-935 | elements_registry prompt migration
Status: {migration_status}
Date: 2026-05-31
Rule:
- Curator refs -> governance/prompts/templates/curator_template.md
- Analyst refs -> governance/prompts/templates/analyst_template.md
- Auditor refs -> governance/prompts/templates/auditor_template.md
- Executor refs -> governance/prompts/templates/executor_template.md
Note:
- WRK-C1/WRK-C2/WRK-C3 legacy prompts are preserved as possible contour overlays until contour overlay registry is created.
- Objects GD/DIR/WRK must not use object prompts.
No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/state/managed_channel_schema.json', '''{
  "version": "1.0",
  "date": "2026-05-31",
  "purpose": "Schema for managed internal communication between curators and contours.",
  "required_fields": ["message_id", "trace_id", "created_at", "source", "target", "route_type", "payload", "status", "proof_ref"],
  "route_types": {
    "vertical_curator_to_curator": {"allowed_source_roles": ["curator"], "allowed_target_roles": ["curator"], "description": "Vertical object communication GD<->DIR<->WRK."},
    "contour_input": {"allowed_source_roles": ["curator"], "allowed_target_roles": ["analyst"], "description": "Curator sends input to Analyst of selected contour."},
    "proposal": {"allowed_source_roles": ["analyst"], "allowed_target_roles": ["auditor"], "description": "Analyst submits proposal to Auditor."},
    "proposal_revision": {"allowed_source_roles": ["auditor"], "allowed_target_roles": ["analyst"], "description": "Auditor returns proposal for revision."},
    "execution_approval": {"allowed_source_roles": ["auditor"], "allowed_target_roles": ["executor"], "description": "Auditor sends approved proposal to Executor."},
    "execution_result": {"allowed_source_roles": ["executor"], "allowed_target_roles": ["auditor"], "description": "Executor sends result to Auditor."},
    "result_revision": {"allowed_source_roles": ["auditor"], "allowed_target_roles": ["analyst"], "description": "Auditor requests result correction through Analyst."},
    "contour_output": {"allowed_source_roles": ["auditor"], "allowed_target_roles": ["curator"], "description": "Auditor releases validated result to Curator."},
    "horizontal_verified_data_transfer": {"allowed_source_roles": ["auditor"], "allowed_target_roles": ["analyst"], "description": "Auditor A transfers verified data to Analyst B."},
    "horizontal_verified_data_request": {"allowed_source_roles": ["analyst"], "allowed_target_roles": ["auditor"], "description": "Analyst B requests verified data from Auditor A."}
  },
  "status_values": ["queued", "delivered", "processing", "completed", "rejected", "operator_gate", "dead_letter"],
  "proof_required": true
}
''')

write_file('governance/state/contour_lifecycle_schema.json', '''{
  "version": "1.0",
  "date": "2026-05-31",
  "purpose": "Canonical internal contour lifecycle.",
  "statuses": [
    {"status":"input_received", "sender":"curator", "receiver":"analyst", "next":["proposal_prepared", "clarification_requested"]},
    {"status":"proposal_prepared", "sender":"analyst", "receiver":"auditor", "next":["proposal_under_audit"]},
    {"status":"proposal_under_audit", "sender":"auditor", "receiver":"auditor", "next":["proposal_approved", "proposal_rejected"]},
    {"status":"proposal_rejected", "sender":"auditor", "receiver":"analyst", "next":["proposal_prepared"]},
    {"status":"proposal_approved", "sender":"auditor", "receiver":"executor", "next":["execution_started"]},
    {"status":"execution_started", "sender":"executor", "receiver":"executor", "next":["execution_result_submitted", "execution_blocked"]},
    {"status":"execution_result_submitted", "sender":"executor", "receiver":"auditor", "next":["result_under_audit"]},
    {"status":"result_under_audit", "sender":"auditor", "receiver":"auditor", "next":["result_approved", "result_rejected", "blocker_confirmed"]},
    {"status":"result_rejected", "sender":"auditor", "receiver":"analyst", "next":["proposal_prepared"]},
    {"status":"result_approved", "sender":"auditor", "receiver":"curator", "next":["contour_result_ready"]},
    {"status":"contour_result_ready", "sender":"auditor", "receiver":"curator", "next":["vertical_report_sent", "horizontal_verified_data_transfer", "completed"]}
  ],
  "hard_rules": [
    "Executor cannot start without proposal_approved.",
    "Contour cannot output result without result_approved.",
    "Revisions go through Analyst.",
    "Horizontal transfer uses verified data only."
  ]
}
''')

write_file('governance/state/event_log_schema.json', '''{
  "version": "1.0",
  "date": "2026-05-31",
  "required_fields": ["event_id", "trace_id", "created_at", "event_type", "source", "target", "status", "proof_ref"],
  "recommended_fields": ["object_id", "contour_id", "logical_role", "provider_id", "fallback_used", "fallback_reason", "experience_refs_loaded", "anti_patterns_checked", "lessons_applied"],
  "event_types": [
    "operator_input_received",
    "telegram_envelope_created",
    "vertical_task_sent",
    "vertical_task_assigned",
    "contour_input_created",
    "proposal_submitted",
    "proposal_rejected",
    "proposal_approved",
    "execution_result_submitted",
    "result_rejected",
    "result_approved",
    "contour_result_ready",
    "horizontal_verified_data_transfer",
    "horizontal_verified_data_request",
    "vertical_result_returned",
    "vertical_report_sent",
    "operator_report_sent",
    "role_activation_requested",
    "provider_failover_used",
    "operator_gate"
  ]
}
''')

write_file('governance/validators/validate_block_d_schemas.py', '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path
required = [
  'governance/state/managed_channel_schema.json',
  'governance/state/contour_lifecycle_schema.json',
  'governance/state/event_log_schema.json',
  'governance/state/elements_prompt_migration_policy.json'
]
missing = [p for p in required if not Path(p).exists()]
if missing:
    raise SystemExit('MISSING: ' + ', '.join(missing))
for p in required:
    json.loads(Path(p).read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
channel = json.loads(Path('governance/state/managed_channel_schema.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert 'vertical_curator_to_curator' in channel['route_types']
assert 'horizontal_verified_data_transfer' in channel['route_types']
lifecycle = json.loads(Path('governance/state/contour_lifecycle_schema.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
statuses = [s['status'] for s in lifecycle['statuses']]
for s in ['proposal_approved','execution_started','result_approved','contour_result_ready']:
    assert s in statuses
print('BEM-935 Block D schema validator PASS')
''')

write_file('governance/reports/BEM935_BLOCK_D_SCHEMAS_PASS.md', '''# BEM-935 | Block D schemas PASS
Status: BLOCK_D_SCHEMAS_PASS

- governance/validators/validate_block_d_schemas.py
Next: Block E managed channel consumer, event writer and dead-letter handling.
No issue comments.
''')

ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
append='''\n\n## BEM-935 completed | 2026-05-31\nImplemented Block D schemas after BEM-934.\nCreated managed_channel_schema, contour_lifecycle_schema, event_log_schema, elements prompt migration report and schema validator.\nResult: BLOCK_D_SCHEMAS_PASS. This is foundation only, not release PASS.\nNext: Block E managed channel consumer, event writer and dead-letter handling.\nNo issue comments.\n'''
ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')+append, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(ctx))
ops_applied.append('BEM-935 Block D schema artifacts created')
"""
No issue comments.
